benefits.description: Started with KPV in the morning and glow at night, now using all-in-one pen cartridge. Also administering to elderly parents (82 years old). One parent (mother with prior hip replacement needing another) reportedly seeing incredible benefits after one month.
Parents on it for joint-related issues; surgeon approved and also suggested HGH

protocol_notes: User switched from separate KPV (morning) + glow (night) to an all-in-one pen cartridge. Also administering to 82-year-old parents. Mother has had hip replacement and needs another; ortho surgeon approved use and additionally suggested HGH.
